note_main_file: No main-file entries are Enhancement spec-specific. ids 70–73 are all spec_tree=-1.
_notes.note_stormstrike: Stormstrike (17364) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_SHAMAN. flags=0x00000000 0x01000010 0x00000000 → [0, 16777232, 0] (mask1: bit4(16) + bit24(16777216)). SpellMod can target it — id=580 is valid.
_notes.note_shared_FT_WF_bit: Flametongue Weapon(8024) and Windfury Weapon(8232) both have flags=0x00000000 0x00000800 0x00000000 = [0, 2048, 0]. mask1 bit11=2048 is intentionally shared — one combined flag [0,2048,0] targets both weapon buff spells simultaneously.

confirmed_flags.WindfuryWeapon_8232: [0, 2048, 0] = mask1 bit11 (0x00000800) — same bit as FT, intentional shared

computed_combined_flags.LS_WS: [1024, 32, 0] — LightningShield mask0 bit10(1024) | WaterShield mask1 bit5(32). No shared bits.
computed_combined_flags.FT_WF: [0, 2048, 0] — Both share mask1 bit11(2048). One flag targets both weapon buff spells.

talent_affixes._todo: Ancestral Knowledge (5r, tier 1) — Increases maximum mana by 1/2/3/4/5%. Passive stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Shield Specialization (3r, tier 1) — Increases the effect of your shield spells by 5/10/15%. Covered by id=581 Improved Shields.

Guardian Totems (2r, tier 1) — Increases the effect of Stoneskin and Windwall Totems by 8/16% and reduces cooldown of Grounding Totem by 1/2s. Mixed effect — add after verifying totem spell IDs and families.
Thundering Strikes (5r, tier 2) — Increases melee crit chance by 1/2/3/4/5%. Passive melee crit, not implementable as SpellMod.
Improved Ghost Wolf (2r, tier 2) — Reduces cast time of Ghost Wolf by 1/2s. CASTING_TIME FLAT -1000ms/rank on Ghost Wolf(2645) — add after verifying .spellinfo all 2645.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Shields
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[1024,32,0]. OR of LightningShield(324) mask0 bit10(1024)|WaterShield(52127) mask1 bit5(32). No shared bits — all bits unique. Carrier Lightning Shield(324) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_SHAMAN. Lightning Shield and Water Shield effectiveness +5%/rank (EFFECT1 PCT: 5). WotLK: 3r at +5/+10/+15%.

talent_affixes.name: Elemental Weapons
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[0,2048,0]=mask1 bit11 (0x00000800). FlametongueWeapon(8024) and WindfuryWeapon(8232) share mask1 bit11=2048 — one combined flag targets both simultaneously. Shared bit is intentional here (no false matches within this pair). Carrier Flametongue Weapon(8024) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_SHAMAN. Flametongue and Windfury Weapon effectiveness +5%/rank (EFFECT1 PCT: 5). WotLK: 3r at +5/+10/+15%.

talent_affixes._todo: Shamanistic Focus (5r, tier 3) — After melee crit, reduces mana cost of next Shock by 20/40/60/80/100%. Conditional proc (melee crit trigger), not implementable as flat SpellMod.
Flurry (5r, tier 3) — After melee crit, increases attack speed by 10/15/20/25/30% for next 3 swings. Proc-based attack speed, not implementable as SpellMod.
Toughness (5r, tier 4) — Increases armor value from items by 2/4/6/8/10%. Passive item stat multiplier, not implementable as SpellMod.
Spirit Weapons (1r, tier 4) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Stormstrike
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[0,16777232,0]=0x01000010. Stormstrike(17364) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_SHAMAN. mask1: bit4(16)+bit24(16777216)=16777232. Carrier Stormstrike(17364) confirmed SPELLFAMILY_SHAMAN. Stormstrike cooldown -2s/rank (COOLDOWN FLAT: -2000ms). WotLK: 2r at -2/-4s.

talent_affixes._todo: Mental Dexterity (3r, tier 5) — Increases Attack Power by 10/20/30% of Intellect. Stat conversion, not implementable as SpellMod.
Unleashed Rage (5r, tier 5) — Melee crits grant nearby party members 4/7/10/13/15% AP. Proc/aura buff, not implementable as SpellMod.
Weapon Mastery (3r, tier 6) — Increases weapon expertise by 2/4/6. Passive expertise stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Dual Wield Specialization (3r, tier 6) — Increases damage done by your offhand attacks by 10/20/30%. Passive melee stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Shamanistic Rage (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Maelstrom Weapon (5r, tier 7) — Melee hits have a 20/40/60/80/100% chance per hit to reduce cast time and mana cost of next spell. Proc-based stacking charge mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.
Static Shock (3r, tier 7) — When you use Stormstrike, you have a 33/66/99% chance to automatically cast a Lightning Shield bolt. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Lava Lash (1r, tier 8) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Improved Lava Lash (2r, tier 8) — Increases Lava Lash damage by 15/30%. DAMAGE PCT +15/rank on Lava Lash — add after verifying Lava Lash spell ID and SPELLFAMILY_SHAMAN with .spellinfo.
Feral Spirit (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
